items.title: How to make the Startup Battlefield Top 20 — and what every company gets regardless
items.summary: Every founder who applies to Startup Battlefield wants the same thing: the Disrupt Main Stage. Here’s how to get there and why the opportunity starts well before the main stage.

items.title: Veritas Aortic Solutions Raises $12M Seed Funding
items.summary: COSTA MESA, CA, Veritas Aortic Solutions, the latest company to spin out of inQB8 Medical Technologies, is pleased to announce the closing of $12M in Seed financing.
